Contributes 'viewsContainers': Webview views - remote HTML/JS possible

supply_chain_findings.detail: ajv@7.1.0 has known vulnerability GHSA-2g4f-4pwh-qvx6 — ajv has ReDoS when using `$data` option (fix: >=8.18.0)
